headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.posthog.com https://*.vercel-analytics.com https://*.vercel-insights.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.supabase.co; connect-src 'self' https://*.posthog.com https://*.vercel-analytics.com https://*.vercel-insights.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
